direction:
i want to use the concept of the image attached for duberymnl. use duberymnl fonts logo and product.
- Same editorial product-hero concept as the last run: sunglasses floating mid-frame with arms stretched forward toward the camera in forced perspective, top hand palm-down above, bottom hand palm-up beneath, model softly out of focus behind, cream knit sweater, deep teal seamless backdrop.
- Defaulting to the same Filipina model with close-cropped buzz cut, warm tan skin, natural tan-brown manicure — and the pro 3-point editorial lighting setup from v2 (camera-left key, soft fill, subtle rim).
- Product swapped to the DuberyMNL SKU you select, tack-sharp focus locked on the product, DUBERY wordmark/logo readable on the temple, lenses reflecting the teal studio environment. 4:5, clean, no overlays — the only DuberyMNL font/logo in frame is what's physically on the product.

Hit Generate when ready.
